Mr Mallorca Golf — Premium Golf Experience in Mallorca, Spain

Andy Griffiths, UK PGA Advanced Professional with 20+ years coaching experience globally (Pebble Beach, Doral, Evian, The Open Championship, China national team). Based in Mallorca since March 2025.

Services:
- The Mallorca Round: Private 18-hole round with on-course coaching, €350+ per person plus green fee
- The Signature Day: Son Gual or Alcanada, lunch at course restaurant, gift, €450+ per person plus green fee
- The Full Experience: Bespoke multi-day experiences with private transport, dinners, spa, on enquiry
- On-Course Coaching: Focused improvement sessions on real courses, not range-based

Key Pages:
- Homepage: mrmallorcagolf.com
- Play with a Pro: mrmallorcagolf.com/play-with-a-pro
- Golf Courses Guide (22 courses, 5 regions): mrmallorcagolf.com/golf-courses
- On-Course Coaching: mrmallorcagolf.com/coaching
- Contact: andy@mrmallorcagolf.com | WhatsApp +34 624 466 702

Philosophy: On-course performance coaching in real conditions — not technical range work. Honest, specific course knowledge. Warm expert tone.

Credentials:
- PGA Advanced Professional (UK's highest golf qualification)
- Applied Golf Management Studies degree (University of Birmingham)
- TPI Junior Level 3 Coach
- Trackman Master certified
- Published author: "Putting It Out There — A Life in Full Swing"
- 11 years coaching in Shanghai, China (fluent Mandarin)
- Established Douyin presence (Chinese golf content)

Courses played first-hand (honest reviews only):
- Son Gual, Alcanada, Santa Ponsa 1, Santa Ponsa 2, Santa Ponsa 3

Target audience: Visiting golfers aged 30–60 with established handicap, disposable income, seeking premium experience over lowest price. Secondary: Resident expat golfers in Mallorca.
